records.question: Which customers named Tillman Ernser who pay by Cheque became customers on or before 2018-02-28 11:37:44 and have a Residential address that started no later than 2010-12-26 08:52:50 and is exactly on 1979-07-16 18:22:39?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_addresses ON customers.customer_id = customer_addresses.customer_id
WHERE customer_addresses.date_address_to = '1979-07-16 18:22:39' AND customer_addresses.date_address_from <= '2010-12-26 08:52:50' AND customers.customer_name = 'Tillman Ernser' AND customers.payment_method = 'Cheque' AND customer_addresses.address_type = 'Residential' AND customers.date_became_customer <= '2018-02-28 11:37:44'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.customer_id FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Customer_Addresses AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id WHERE T1.customer_name = 'Tillman Ernser' AND T1.payment_method = 'Cheque' AND T1.date_became_customer <= '2018-02-28 11:37:44' AND T2.address_type = 'Residential' AND T2.date_address_from = '1979-07-16 18:22:39'

records.question: Which customers became customers on or before 2018-03-08 01:17:31, whose residential address ended exactly on 2010-05-08 10:00:17, and whose contact number 542.983.0224 was active at most until 2018-03-15 02:34:01?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_addresses ON customers.customer_id = customer_addresses.customer_id
JOIN customer_contact_channels ON customers.customer_id = customer_contact_channels.customer_id
WHERE customer_addresses.date_address_to = '2010-05-08 10:00:17' AND customer_addresses.address_type = 'Residential' AND customer_contact_channels.active_to_date <= '2018-03-15 02:34:01' AND customer_contact_channels.contact_number = '542.983.0224' AND customers.date_became_customer <= '2018-03-08 01:17:31'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.customer_id FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Customer_Addresses AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id INNER JOIN Customer_Contact_Channels AS T3 ON T1.customer_id = T3.customer_id WHERE T1.date_became_customer <= '2018-03-08 01:17:31' AND T2.address_type = 'Residential' AND T2.date_address_to = '2010-05-08 10:00:17' AND T3.contact_number = '542.983.0224' AND T3.active_to_date <= '2018-03-15 02:34:01'

records.question: Which customers pay by Cheque and can be contacted through Handheld?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_contact_channels ON customers.customer_id = customer_contact_channels.customer_id
WHERE customer_contact_channels.channel_code = 'Handheld' AND customers.payment_method = 'Cheque'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.customer_id FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Customer_Contact_Channels AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id WHERE T1.payment_method = 'Cheque' AND T2.channel_code = 'Handheld'

records.question: Who are the customers named Prof. Ibrahim Bashirian who pay with Cash, have a Billing address, became customers on or before 2018-03-15 02:54:27, and use a Handheld contact channel with number 1-687-190-8968x63811 that was active on or before 2018-03-04 13:35:57?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_addresses ON customers.customer_id = customer_addresses.customer_id
JOIN customer_contact_channels ON customers.customer_id = customer_contact_channels.customer_id
WHERE customers.payment_method = 'Cash' AND customer_contact_channels.channel_code = 'Handheld' AND customer_contact_channels.contact_number = '1-687-190-8968x63811' AND customers.date_became_customer <= '2018-03-15 02:54:27' AND customer_contact_channels.active_to_date <= '2018-03-04 13:35:57' AND customer_addresses.address_type = 'Billing' AND customers.customer_name = 'Prof. Ibrahim Bashirian'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.customer_id FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Customer_Addresses AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id INNER JOIN Customer_Contact_Channels AS T3 ON T1.customer_id = T3.customer_id WHERE T1.customer_name = 'Prof. Ibrahim Bashirian' AND T1.payment_method = 'Cash' AND T2.address_type = 'Billing' AND T1.date_became_customer <= '2018-03-15 02:54:27' AND T3.channel_code = 'Handheld' AND T3.contact_number = '1-687-190-8968x63811' AND T3.active_from_date <= '2018-03-04 13:35:57' AND (T3.active_to_date IS NULL OR T3.active_to_date >= '2018-03-04 13:35:57')

records.question: Which customers became customers exactly on 2018-03-08 01:17:31 and have addresses at 41632 Kerluke Field, East Pascale, Texas, USA where they lived there starting on or after 2003-07-08 05:33:19 and ending on or before 2010-05-08 10:00:17?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_addresses ON customers.customer_id = customer_addresses.customer_id
JOIN addresses ON customer_addresses.address_id = addresses.address_id
WHERE customer_addresses.date_address_from >= '2003-07-08 05:33:19' AND addresses.address_content = '41632 Kerluke Field' AND addresses.city = 'East Pascale' AND customers.date_became_customer = '2018-03-08 01:17:31' AND customer_addresses.date_address_to <= '2010-05-08 10:00:17' AND addresses.state_province_county = 'Texas' AND addresses.country = 'USA'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.customer_id FROM Customers AS T1 INNER JOIN Customer_Addresses AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id INNER JOIN Addresses AS T3 ON T2.address_id = T3.address_id WHERE T1.date_became_customer = '2018-03-08 01:17:31' AND T3.address_content = '41632 Kerluke Field' AND T3.city = 'East Pascale' AND T3.state_province_county = 'Texas' AND T3.country = 'USA' AND T2.date_address_from >= '2003-07-08 05:33:19' AND T2.date_address_to <= '2010-05-08 10:00:17'
